mapper.select:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.approved_at, '%Y-%m') as statementId, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(p.approved_at, INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(p.approved_at)-1 DAY), '%Y-%m-01') as periodStart, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(p.approved_at), '%Y-%m-%d') as periodEnd, SUM(p.amount) as totalAmount, COUNT(p.payment_id) as paymentCount FROM Payments p JOIN Orders o ON p.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.payment_status = 'APPROVED'
AND p.approved_at >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND p.approved_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.approved_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY statementId DESC
